summary: The diff implements a 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' section in App.tsx with branded styled tiles for all six required companies (Aqualab, Smartway, Laborate, Cipla, Smartlab, Smart Iconic) using blue and green color schemes. The section uses responsive grid layout and fits the existing site design. All REQ-1 acceptance criteria appear to be addressed, though logo images use styled fallback tiles rather than real logo image URLs.
